metadata.title: Big Buck Bunny (HLS Stream)
metadata.description: A large and lovable rabbit deals with three bullying rodents in this classic open-source animated film by the Blender Foundation. This is served as an HLS playlist folder from IPFS.
metadata.author: Blender Foundation

metadata.title: IPFS Community Test Video
metadata.description: A short sample HLS video playlist containing several segment chunks. Ideal for verifying gateway connections and node pin performance.
metadata.author: IPFS Community
